---
title: "software"
format: html
---

---
title: "Statistical Software"
---

# Statistical Software

The following table provides an overview of the statistical software packages I have used, the types of data I worked with, and the methods I applied.

| Software | Data Types | Methods | Example Applications |
|-----------|------------|----------|----------------------|
| **R** | Longitudinal data, animal movement data, survey data, experimental data | Hidden Markov Models, GLMs, Linear Mixed Models, ANOVA, Bootstrap, Maximum Likelihood Estimation | Analysis of muskox movement data using Hidden Markov Models |
| **Stata** | Choice experiment data, survey data, panel data, economic data | Conditional Logit Models, Mixed Logit Models, Marginal Effects, Panel Data Analysis | Sustainable investment choice experiment |
| **Python** | Unstructured text data, social media data | NLP, Tokenization, Stemming, Sentiment Analysis, Classification Evaluation | Sentiment analysis of airline tweets in Google Colab |
| **SPSS** | Survey data, socio-economic data, cross-sectional data | Multiple Linear Regression, ANOVA, Factor Analysis, Cluster Analysis, Discriminant Analysis | Multivariate statistical analysis |
| **Tableau** | International socio-economic indicator data | Scatterplots, Histograms, Boxplots, Interactive Dashboards | World Indicators dataset |
| **Git/GitHub** | Code repositories, websites | Version Control, Collaboration, GitHub Pages Deployment | Hosting and deployment of a Quarto website |
| **Quarto** | Reports, websites, reproducible analyses | Dynamic Reporting, Website Development, Reproducible Research | Personal portfolio website |
| **LaTeX** | Academic documents | Scientific Writing, Mathematical Typesetting | Reports, assignments and presentations |
